---
title: "market_shares"
output: rmarkdown::html_vignette
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{market_shares}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---

```{r, include = FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  collapse = TRUE,
  comment = "#>"
)
```

```{r setup}
library(OdumModularDesignR)
```

This is a page to demonstrate how this package is used.  
First, load data.


```{r}
file = system.file("testdata/passengers.csv", package = "OdumModularDesignR")
data = read.csv(file)
```

Then we can calculate busiest routes...
